role_summary: Architectural reference defining the external dependencies, infrastructure components, and abstracted interfaces required for a system that performs source code ingestion, semantic analysis, and automated documentation generation.
extracted_finding: The system relies on an abstracted AI inference engine to handle semantic code analysis, intent extraction, and the generation of formal specifications and architectural artifacts, supporting both cloud and local deployments without workflow disruption. Core functional responsibilities include direct host file system access for raw source ingestion, a data validation framework to enforce output schema integrity, standardized markup and diagram syntaxes for cross-platform interoperability, and repository filtering logic leveraging version control ignore patterns to exclude irrelevant artifacts. These dependencies establish a modular, environment-agnostic pipeline that transforms raw technical evidence into structured, validated documentation.
